name: Caleb
description:
“Let’s get set up somewhere and make sure we get some sunscreen on you — waterproof, this time.” | In which Caleb brings her to the beach.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Summer is finally here, and Caleb has been ready to get out of Skyhaven. The sun beginning to make its way out of hiding and the heat starting to spike, a beach day is only a natural. They used to go often together, but now, it’ll be their first time going since she got back from Skyhaven. He knows it’ll be different — he just wasn’t expecting himself to almost lose his cool seeing her in something as revealing as a bikini.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-
